scenario: The tablet keeps freezing right when you get to the hardest level of your game. It's happened three times now.
Your teacher said the class rule is no running, but she let Marcus run to the bathroom. You got in trouble for the same thing yesterday.
Miles is crying but he won't say why. He just keeps saying 'nothing' when you ask.
The light in your room is flickering. It started two days ago and it's getting worse.
Your project partner did their part wrong and now the whole thing doesn't work the way you planned.
The lunch line is taking forever and everyone is complaining but nobody is doing anything about it.
You built a tower out of blocks and it fell down right before you finished.
A new kid at school doesn't know anyone. They're just standing by the wall at recess.
James solved a really hard puzzle but he won't tell you how he did it.
Your best friend said they don't want to be best friends anymore. They didn't say why.
You found a baby bird on the ground under a tree. It can't fly.
Everyone at the table got the same snack as you but yours tastes different. Why would that happen?
James is really quiet and hasn't said anything for a long time. Something seems wrong.
You want to help James with his homework but you don't understand any of it.
